recipe.description: Use thighs, trim off fat, marinade in lemon/garlic/salt

recipe.title: Burrito Bowl

ingredient_lines.note: I put boneless, in a 13x 9 pan., (McCormick perfect pinch Cajun seasoning is the most used spice in our house. We use it on everything. It's amazing.)
ingredient_lines.preparation: I very lightly brush them with some oil and put salt, Cover with foil and bake at 425 for about 20 minutes, until everything reaches a safe temperature.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: chicken - I put boneless, skinless chicken thighs in a 13x9 pan. I very lightly brush them with some oil and put salt, pepper, and Cajun seasoning on them. (McCormick perfect pinch Cajun seasoning is the most used spice in our house. We use it on everything. It's amazing.) Cover with foil and bake at 425 for about 20 minutes, until everything reaches a safe temperature.

ingredient_lines.note: I cook whatever rice I'm using (brown this time, I've used white as well), At the end I'll add in some fresh lime juice and cilantro.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Rice - I cook whatever rice I'm using (brown this time, I've used white as well) according to package directions. At the end I'll add in some fresh lime juice and cilantro.

ingredient_lines.input_item: Veggies - I heat a little oil in a skillet and saute peppers Per my husband's preference
ingredient_lines.note: and onion of choice until desired doneness., I'll stop cooking them once the thinner slices of onion start to char a bit., I'm going to try adding oregano next time.
ingredient_lines.preparation: Ill usually throw on some spices and, as one user suggested
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Veggies - I heat a little oil in a skillet and saute peppers and onion of choice until desired doneness. Per my husband's preference, I'll stop cooking them once the thinner slices of onion start to char a bit. Ill usually throw on some spices and, as one user suggested, I'm going to try adding oregano next time.

ingredient_lines.note: This is the lazy part. It's just a can of, I open it and spoon it on top, lol
ingredient_lines.raw_text: beans - This is the lazy part. It's just a can of seasoned black beans. I open it and spoon it on top, lol

ingredient_lines.note: several other users below posted recipes, but I take a bag of frozen, some red onion, a ton of cilantro, The recipe also calls for roasted poblano pepper, but due to limited availability
ingredient_lines.preparation: prepared according to microwave instructions, we skipped it the first time and never bothered to add it any other time.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: corn salsa - several other users below posted recipes, but I take a bag of frozen, steam-in-bag sweet corn, prepared according to microwave instructions, and mix it with a jalapeño, some red onion, a ton of cilantro, and fresh lime juice. The recipe also calls for roasted poblano pepper, but due to limited availability, we skipped it the first time and never bothered to add it any other time.
